---
title: "Contact"
description-meta: "Reach out to me with questions and comments"
title-block-banner: false
---

<center>

**Jiugeng Sun**

Scientific Assistant

Ecosystem Management (EM) Lab, Department of Environmental Systems Science

Interactive Visualization & Intelligence Augmentation (IVIA) Lab, Department of Computer Science

ETH Zürich

CHN G 72 Universitätstrasse 16, 8092 Zürich, Switzerland

jiugeng.sun@inf.ethz.ch 

</center>
